title: Optimized _mint with overflow check and inline total supply update
explanation: Overflow is checked using lt(after, before) — if addition wrapped around, after will be less than before. This is cheaper than Solidity's built-in checked arithmetic which uses a separate opcode sequence. totalSupply is loaded once, incremented, checked, and stored — single SLOAD for the check.
when_to_apply: Any mint function that increments totalSupply and a balance
when_not_to_apply: Tokens with max supply caps requiring additional checks, rebasing tokens
